title: Timetracking footer/summarization
excerpt:
Please bring back the timetracking summarization/footer. 
This is such a crucial feature of time mangement and project management, it seems ridiculous that the feature has been wiped. 
Uploading: Monday 2.png…

posts.author: AlexanderBS (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please bring back the timetracking summarization/footer.
This is such a crucial feature of time mangement and project management, it seems ridiculous that the feature has been wiped.
Uploading: Monday 2.png…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AlexanderBS

We will certainly share your comments internally with our team and apologise for the setback here That said, you can still pull total time-tracking data using the formula column in your board.

We hope this can work for you!
